Text: I had the pleasure of working with Shubhika during her time at Sanas, and I was consistently impressed by her professionalism and dedication. She was always prompt with her responses, handled every request with efficiency, and went above and beyond to support me during the recruiting process. Her strong work ethic and collaborative approach made working with her a great experience. I’m confident that Shubhika will continue to excel in her career and achieve great success. Wishing her all the best for the future!

I had the pleasure of working closely with Asutosh during our time at NovaSignal, where he demonstrated his exceptional skills as a full stack developer. Asutosh consistently impressed me with his ability to effortlessly switch between backend tasks in Python and frontend development in JavaScript, all while maintaining high standards of performance and scalability.  During our collaboration, Asutosh was a true problem solver. He tackled challenges head-on, often staying late into the night until he found a solution. His determination, coupled with his deep technical expertise, made him an invaluable asset to our team. While his direct approach to feedback could sometimes be a bit sharp, his critiques were always grounded in truth and aimed at improving the overall quality of the project. He truly has a good heart and is deeply committed to delivering the best results.  As someone new to programming at the time, I was fortunate to have Asutosh as a pair programmer. He was patient, supportive, and always willing to share his knowledge, helping me navigate complex problems and grow in my role. His work on the development of microservices for cloud applications at NovaSignal, as well as his leadership in integrating tools for medical data visualization and processing, showcased his ability to handle complex and mission-critical tasks, often under tight deadlines.  Asutosh’s passion for technology, his commitment to excellence, and his problem-solving mindset make him an outstanding full stack developer. I highly recommend him to any team looking for a competent, hardworking, and dedicated professional.

Joe was the program manager of our new cloud team based in two separate geographic location which brings in, its own set of difficulties. But, as they say "the difficulties brings the best out of a highly competent person" that is Joe. He was kind, helpful and ever present as our PM. He took upon his role with the highest professionalism, diligence and was the spokesman for our team. I have seen him liaise with all the other departments in the company and was the voice of our team wherever he went. He always looked after the needs of the team and was always present whenever any help was required. He has built-up considerable knowledge and skills in the medical industry (Regulatory, FDA) that would be valuable asset to any team.  His work ethic was of the highest quality. Any team would be blessed to have an individual like him on its roster.

Aditya’s work on QCH(Qualitative Cerebral Hemodynamics) was pivotal to the organization. He took complete ownership of the feature in the cloud app right from the conception to its final deployment to the hospital. Moreover, he liaised between different teams (Innovation, Marketing, Medical) in the company to get the features to the physician's even if it meant that he had to work on the codebase of a different team. Since this was a novel idea from the company he was part of the core team that was tasked with communicating the feature to physician's by giving demos in which he excelled with his great presentation and communication skills.  I had several interactions with him and he was more than generous with his time with me being a newbie to the programming. He had shown that he dependable, team player and a multi-faceted individual. He has places to go and any firm who would get him would have an asset in its hands.
Sudesh was always hard working and commited to the work. He was up for any tasks and was hugely helpful during our time together designing for tooling.
